question: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?doctoralSupervisor ?countryHimalayas ?countryLimerickLake
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q937>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P184>  ?doctoralSupervisor .
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5451>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  ?countryHimalayas .
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6386177>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  ?countryLimerickLake
  }

question: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?conflict ?animal ?bird
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q170596>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P607>  ?conflict
      }
    UNION
      { ?animal <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q729> .
        ?animal  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P141>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219127>
      }
    UNION
      { ?bird (<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P171>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5113> .
        ?bird  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P141>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219127>
      }
  }

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?uri
WHERE
  { ?uri    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
            <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate ;

    ?award  rdfs:label            ?awardLabel

  }
ORDER BY DESC(?birthDate)

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

      }
    UNION
      { BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q213959> AS ?redSox)
        ?redSox  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P115>  ?stadium
      }
    UNION
      { ?mvpPlayer  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate ;

        FILTER langMatches(lang(?awardLabel), "EN")
        FILTER ( contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "mvp") || contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "most valuable player") )
      }
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?birthDate)
LIMIT   4

question: In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?uri
WHERE
  { ?uri    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
            <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate ;
            <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P166>  ?award .
    ?award  rdfs:label            ?awardLabel
    FILTER ( contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "mvp") || contains(lcase(str(?awardLabel)), "most valuable player") )
    FILTER langMatches(lang(?awardLabel), "EN")
  }
ORDER BY ?birthDate
LIMIT   4

question: How many cities are part of the Pearl River Delta?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?capitalPopulation ?germanCity ?germanCityPopulation ?leastPopulatedCity ?leastPopulation
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q408>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P36>  ?capital .
    ?capital  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?capitalPopulation .
    ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?germanCityPopulation
    FILTER ( ?germanCityPopulation > 250000 )
    ?leastPopulatedCity
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?leastPopulation
  }
ORDER BY ?leastPopulation
LIMIT   1

messages:
```PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?capitalPopulation ?germanCity ?germanCityPopulation ?leastPopulatedCity ?leastPopulation WHERE {
  # Get population of the capital of Australia
  wd:Q408 wdt:P36 ?capital .
  ?capital wdt:P1082 ?capitalPopulation .

  # Get German cities with more than 250000 inhabitants
  ?germanCity wdt:P17 wd:Q183 ;     # country Germany
               wdt:P31 wd:Q515 ;    # instance of city
               wdt:P1082 ?germanCityPopulation .
  FILTER(?germanCityPopulation > 250000)

  # Get city with the least inhabitants
  ?leastPopulatedCity wdt:P31 wd:Q515 ;
                     wdt:P1082 ?leastPopulation .
}
ORDER BY ?leastPopulation
LIMIT 1
```

question: How many city-states are currently in the world?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT  ?germanCity ?population
WHERE
  {   { ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population
        FILTER ( ?population > 250000 )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q408>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P36>  ?capitalOfAustralia .
        ?capitalOfAustralia
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?populationOfCapital

                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P36>  ?capitalOfMexico .
        ?state    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q15149663> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q96>
      }
  }
LIMIT   100

SELECT DISTINCT  ?mountain

  { ?mountain  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8502> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2044>  ?elevation

ORDER BY DESC(?elevation)
LIMIT   1

- For highest mountain in Australia: Mountain instance of Q8502 and country or location is Australia (Q408) or continent Australia (Q3960), ordered by elevation DESC limit 1
- Highest mountain: All mountains ordered by elevation DESC limit 1

Australia is country = Q408 or continent Q3960, but example uses continent Q3960

question: How many official languages has Pakistan ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?country ?language
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q843>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language
        BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q843> AS ?country)
      }
    UNION
      { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?country ?language
HAVING ( ( ?country = <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q843> ) || ( COUNT(?language) > 2 ) )
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?language))
LIMIT   10

```PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
  FILTER(?pop_german_city > 250000)
}
LIMIT 1
```

PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT  ?question ?uri

    OPTIONAL

               <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P571>  ?dateAdmitted

               <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language

    BIND(coalesce(?uri1, ?uri2, ?uri3) AS ?uri)
  }
GROUP BY ?question ?uri
ORDER BY ?question DESC(?dateAdmitted) DESC(COUNT(?language))

question: Is ALDI also in Italy?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?owner ?highestMountain ?timeZone
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q125054>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P355>  ?owner .
    ?highestMountain
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8502> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q38> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2044>  ?elevation .
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q220>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P421>  ?timeZone
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?elevation)
LIMIT   1

question: is Isfahan a big city?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?germanCity ?writer ?mayor
WHERE
  { { ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population
      FILTER ( ?population > 250000 )
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?writer  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q36180> .
        ?writer <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P69>/<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P131> <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q406>
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q33935>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P6>  ?mayor
      }
  }

question: Is math related to science ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?doctoralSupervisor ?scientistCount ?theoryCount
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q937>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P184>  ?doctoralSupervisor
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?scientist) AS ?scientistCount)
      WHERE
        { ?scientist  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q901> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P69>  ?university .
          ?ivyUni   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P527>  ?university
          FILTER ( ?ivyUni = <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q49113> )
        }
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?theory) AS ?theoryCount)
      WHERE
        { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q937>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P800>  ?theory
        }
    }
  }

question: Is Python a kind of Programming languages?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?lang) AS ?numberOfProgrammingLanguages) (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?influencedLang ; separator=', ') AS ?programmingLanguagesInfluencedByPerl) (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?developerName ; separator=', ') AS ?developersOfSlack)
WHERE
  { ?lang <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q9143>
    OPTIONAL
      { ?influencedLang
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q9143> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P737>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q42478>
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?dev  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1056>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q17130715> ;
              rdfs:label            ?developerName
        FILTER ( lang(?developerName) = "en" )
      }
  }

                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P69>  ?almaMater .

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT  ?producer ?actor ?count
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

        WHERE
          { ?film  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424> ;
                   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q37876> ;
                   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P162>  ?producer
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT DISTINCT  ?actor
        WHERE
          { ?movie  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P162>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q193668> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P495>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q29> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  ?actor
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

      }
  }

question: What colors does the German national flag have?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?germanyPopulationDensityRank ?germanCity ?femaleChancellor
WHERE
  {   { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?germanyPopulationDensityRank)
        WHERE
          { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
            BIND(( ?population / ?area ) AS ?density)
            <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183>
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?germanPopulation ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?germanArea
            BIND(( ?germanPopulation / ?germanArea ) AS ?germanDensity)
            FILTER ( ?density > ?germanDensity )
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?germanCity
        WHERE
          { ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?pop
            FILTER ( ?pop > 250000 )
          }
      }
    UNION
      { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
        PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
        PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
        PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
        PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
        
        SELECT  ?femaleChancellor
        WHERE
          { ?femaleChancellor
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P21>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6581072> ;
                      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P39>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4970706>
          }
      }
  }

SELECT  ?entity
WHERE

    UNION
      { ?entity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P21>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6581072> ;

        FILTER ( year(?inception) = 1930 )
      }
  }

question: What instruments did Louis Armstrong play?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?property ?value
WHERE
  { { VALUES ?person { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q189080> <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q154216> }
      ?person  ?prop  ?value
      VALUES ( ?prop ?property ) {
        ( <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P136> "genre" )
        ( <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1303> "instrument" )
      }
      FILTER ( ( ( ?person = <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q189080> ) && ( ?prop = <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P136> ) ) || ( ( ?person = <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q154216> ) && ( ?prop = <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1303> ) ) )
    }
  }
ORDER BY ?property ?value

      }
  }

question: What is the combined total revenue of three largest Big Tech companies ordered by number of employees?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?question ?answer
WHERE
  { VALUES ?question { "Which Indian company has the most employees?" "Which companies have more than 1 million employees?" "What is the revenue of IBM?" }
    BIND(if(( ?question = "Which Indian company has the most employees?" ), str(concat("SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri wdt:P31 wd:Q4830453; wdt:P17 wd:Q668; wdt:P1128 ?employees } ORDER BY DESC(?employees) LIMIT 1")), if(( ?question = "Which companies have more than 1 million employees?" ), str(concat("PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>\n", "PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>\n", "SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE {\n", "  ?type wdt:P279* wd:Q4830453 .\n", "  ?uri wdt:P31 ?type; wdt:P1128 ?num .\n", "  FILTER(?num > 1000000)\n", "}")), if(( ?question = "What is the revenue of IBM?" ), str(concat("SELECT ?o1 WHERE { wd:Q37156 wdt:P2139 ?o1 }")), ""))) AS ?answer)
  }
LIMIT   3

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?surinameLanguage ?iranBorders ?countryMostLanguages
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q730>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?surinameLanguage .
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q794>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P47>  ?iranBorders
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?countryMostLanguages (COUNT(?language) AS ?langCount)
      WHERE
        { ?countryMostLanguages
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language
        }
      GROUP BY ?countryMostLanguages
      ORDER BY DESC(?langCount)
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

question: What language do they speak in Poland ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?population ?languages
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q36>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population .
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q191>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2936>  ?languages
  }

question: How many different languages are spoken in West Europe?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?country
WHERE
  { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language
    FILTER EXISTS { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P30>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q46> }
  }
GROUP BY ?country
HAVING ( COUNT(?language) > 2 )

messages:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?country WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P37 ?language .
  FILTER EXISTS { ?country wdt:P30 wd:Q46 } # Part of Western Europe (Q46: Western Europe)
}
GROUP BY ?country
HAVING(COUNT(?language) > 2)
```

question: Is Germany bigger than Poland?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?populationPoland ?smallestCityGermany ?germanyDensityRank
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q36>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?populationPoland
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?smallestCityGermany
      WHERE
        { ?smallestCityGermany
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
          ?smallestCityGermany <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
          ?smallestCityGermany
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
        }
      ORDER BY ?area
      LIMIT   1
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(?country) AS ?germanyDensityRank)
      WHERE
        { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
          BIND(( ?population / ?area ) AS ?density)
          <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?germanPopulation ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?germanArea
          BIND(( ?germanPopulation / ?germanArea ) AS ?germanDensity)
          FILTER ( ?density > ?germanDensity )
        }
    }
  }

question: What notes does a C major chord consist of?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?instrument ?writer
WHERE
  { OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q154216>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1303>  ?instrument
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q780394>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P86>  ?writer
      }
  }

question: When did the first sperm whales exist?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?jackWolfskinFoundedDate (COUNT(DISTINCT ?surfer) AS ?numberOfSurfers) ?org ?orgFoundedDate
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q536133>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P571>  ?jackWolfskinFoundedDate .
    ?surfer   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q13561328> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P19>  ?birthplace .
    ?birthplace  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q408> .
    ?org      <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q43229> ;
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P571>  ?orgFoundedDate
    FILTER ( year(?orgFoundedDate) = 1930 )
  }
GROUP BY ?jackWolfskinFoundedDate ?org ?orgFoundedDate

```PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?jackWolfskinFoundedDate (COUNT(DISTINCT ?surfer) AS ?numberOfSurfers) ?org ?orgFoundedDate WHERE {
  # When was Jack Wolfskin founded?
  wd:Q536133 wdt:P571 ?jackWolfskinFoundedDate .
  
  # Which professional surfers were born in Australia?
  ?surfer wdt:P106 wd:Q13561328 ;
          wdt:P19 ?birthplace .
  ?birthplace wdt:P17 wd:Q408 .
  
  # Which organizations were founded in 1930?
  ?org wdt:P31 wd:Q43229 ;
       wdt:P571 ?orgFoundedDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?orgFoundedDate) = 1930)
}
GROUP BY ?jackWolfskinFoundedDate ?org ?orgFoundedDate
```

question: When was Marlene Dietrich born?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?name ?year
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q567>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1477>  ?name
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q241665>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?date
        BIND(year(?date) AS ?year)
      }
  }

PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri ?mingDissolveDate ?dianaDeathDate
WHERE
  { { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q596>
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P61>  ?uri
    }
    { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q9903>

    }
    { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q9685>
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P570>  ?dianaDeathDate
    }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?poet
WHERE
  { ?poet  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q49757> .
    ?book  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  ?poet ;
           <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q571>
  }
GROUP BY ?poet
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?book))
LIMIT   1

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT  ?item ?date ?university
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q536133>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P571>  ?date
        BIND("Jack Wolfskin" AS ?item)
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q567>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P69>  ?university
        BIND("Angela Merkel" AS ?item)
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q471891>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P571>  ?date
        BIND("De Beers" AS ?item)
      }
  }
ORDER BY ?item

SELECT  ?bachBirthPlace ?germanActors ?tomHanksSpouse
WHERE
  { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1339>

      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?actor ; separator=', ') AS ?germanActors)

        { ?actor  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q10800557> ;

        }
    }
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q2263>

  }

  {   { ?uri  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P178>  ?com .

        ?com <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> .
        ?com  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P740>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q99>

      }

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?president ?wife
WHERE
  {   { ?president <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P39>/<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279> <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q30461> .
        ?president  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate
        FILTER ( year(?birthDate) = 1945 )
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q91>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P26>  ?wife
        BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q91> AS ?president)
      }
  }

question: which animal can possibly live longer, panda or koala?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?criticallyEndangeredAnimal ?elephantSpecies ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath
WHERE
  { ?criticallyEndangeredAnimal
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P141>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q219127> .
    <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q7378>
              <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>  ?elephantSpecies
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath (COUNT(DISTINCT ?s) AS ?count)
      WHERE
        { ?s  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P509>  ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath }
      GROUP BY ?mostFrequentCauseOfDeath
      ORDER BY DESC(?count)
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }

question: Which archipelago has more islands: the Galápagos Islands or the Hawaiian Islands ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?uri
WHERE
  {   { ?volcano  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8072> }
    UNION
      { ?volcano  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  ?type .
        ?type (<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q8072>
      }
    ?volcano  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  ?uri
  }
GROUP BY ?uri
HAVING ( COUNT(?volcano) > 10 )

    ?museum   <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q207694>
  }

question: Did Germany have a population growth of at least 1% since 2010?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?populationDensityRank ?largeCity ?smallestCityByArea
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS ?populationDensityRank)
      WHERE
        { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
          BIND(( ?population / ?area ) AS ?density)
          <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?germanPopulation ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?germanArea
          BIND(( ?germanPopulation / ?germanArea ) AS ?germanDensity)
          FILTER ( ?density > ?germanDensity )
        }
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?largeCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
        ?largeCity <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
        ?largeCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?cityPopulation
        FILTER ( ?cityPopulation > 250000 )
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
          PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
          PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
          PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
          PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
          
          SELECT  ?smallestCityByArea
          WHERE
            { ?smallestCityByArea
                        <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
              ?smallestCityByArea <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
              ?smallestCityByArea
                        <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?cityArea
            }
          ORDER BY ?cityArea
          LIMIT   1
        }
      }
  }

PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?country ?formOfGovernment
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q258>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P122>  ?formOfGovernment
        BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q258> AS ?country)
      }
    UNION
      { ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6256> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?country ?formOfGovernment
HAVING ( ( ?country = <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q258> ) || ( COUNT(?language) > 2 ) )
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(?language))
LIMIT   2

  }
ORDER BY ?person ?property

question: Which kingdom preceded the Thonburi Kingdom ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?capital ?formOfGovernment ?country
WHERE
  { VALUES ?question { 1 2 3 }
    BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5451> AS ?himalayas)
    BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q258> AS ?southAfrica)
      { FILTER ( ?question = 1 )
        ?himalayas  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  ?country .
        ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P36>  ?capital
      }
    UNION
      { FILTER ( ?question = 2 )
        BIND(?southAfrica AS ?country)
        ?country  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P122>  ?formOfGovernment
      }
    UNION
      { FILTER ( ?question = 3 )
        ?himalayas  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  ?country
      }
  }
LIMIT   100

  { { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q928>

    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  ?language

                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P37>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q5287>
        }
    }
  }

sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q658375>

        FILTER ( ?book != <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q658375> )
      }
    UNION
      { ?book  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P50>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q72653> }
    UNION

                 <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q571>
      }
  }
GROUP BY ?author ?book

question: Who is the oldest cast member of the Netflix show “Queer Eye” ?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?actor
WHERE
  {   { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q858840>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P161>  ?actor
      }
    UNION
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q51803>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P175>  ?actor
      }
    UNION
      { ?actor  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q33999> ;
                <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P19>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q90> ;

question: what is the oldest film festival?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?producer ?film_with_max_budget ?release_date
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?producer (COUNT(?film) AS ?countFilms)
      WHERE
        { ?film  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424> ;
                 <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P162>  ?producer
        }
      GROUP BY ?producer
      ORDER BY DESC(?countFilms)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?film_with_max_budget
      WHERE
        { ?film_with_max_budget
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P57>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q56008> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q11424> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2130>  ?budget
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?budget)
      LIMIT   1
    }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?release_date
      WHERE
        { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q6667101>
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P7936>  ?event .
          ?event    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P131>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q55> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P577>  ?release_date
        }
    }
  }
LIMIT   1

question: Does Samsung Electronics or Apple have more employees?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?company ?employees
WHERE
  {   { ?company  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q668> ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1128>  ?employees
      }
    UNION
      { BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q37156> AS ?company)
        ?company  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1128>  ?employees
      }
    UNION
      { ?type (<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q4830453> .
        ?company  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>  ?type ;
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1128>  ?employees
        FILTER ( ?employees > 1000000 )
      }
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?employees)
LIMIT   10

question: who has won more NBA awards, Michael Jordan or Kobe Bean Bryant？
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?youngestMVPs ?youngestMVPsLabel ?michaelJordanHeight ?michaelJacksonDeath
WHERE
  { { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?youngestMVPs
      WHERE
        { ?youngestMVPs
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P106>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q3665646> ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P569>  ?birthDate ;
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P166>  ?award .
          ?award    rdfs:label            ?awardLabel
          FILTER ( ( contains(lcase(?awardLabel), "mvp") || contains(lcase(?awardLabel), "most valuable player") ) && langMatches(lang(?awardLabel), "en") )
        }
      ORDER BY DESC(?birthDate)
      LIMIT   4
    }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?youngestMVPs
                  rdfs:label  ?youngestMVPsLabel
        FILTER langMatches(lang(?youngestMVPsLabel), "en")
      }
    BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q41421> AS ?mj)
    OPTIONAL
      { ?mj  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2048>  ?michaelJordanHeight }
    BIND(<http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q2831> AS ?mjAck)
    OPTIONAL
      { ?mjAck  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P570>  ?michaelJacksonDeath }
  }

question: which city is more populated, copenhagen or amsterdam?
sparql:
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>

SELECT  ?germanCity ?population ?students ?smallestCity
WHERE
  { ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
    ?germanCity <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
    ?germanCity  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P1082>  ?population
    FILTER ( ?population > 250000 )
    OPTIONAL
      { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q214341>
                  <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2196>  ?students
      }
    { PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
      PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
      PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
      PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
      PREFIX  dc:   <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
      
      SELECT  ?smallestCity
      WHERE
        { ?smallestCity
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P17>  <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q183> .
          ?smallestCity <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P31>/(<http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P279>)* <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q515> .
          ?smallestCity
                    <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/P2046>  ?area
        }
      ORDER BY ?area
      LIMIT   1
    }
  }
LIMIT   100
